metadata.title:
Press Drdws First Blood in Its Fight
for People Against Gas Monopoly---
Ordinances Introduced in Council to
Examine That Company's Product
and Put an End to Deposits.

pages.raw_text:
The city council at last nights
meeting sat up and took notice Of
the Iniquities of the gas company
as set forth in The Press.


Ordinances were introduced look
Ing to the appointment of gas
inspector and to the wiping out Of
the illegal demands for deposits.
This latter will be Cooperative on
che Washington Water Power COM
pany as we'll as on the gas COM
pany.


THE PRESS HAS WON THE
FIRST STEP IN ITS FIGHT IN
THE CASE OF THE PEOPLE
AGAINST THE GAS COMPANY.
6Now, Mr.. Consumer Of gas, also Of
eIectricity--for the big light and
power company will now enter the
lists in behalf of it's fellow mono.
polist - watch your councilman.
Watch his every move. Observe
when the corporation blight strikes
him. Decipher, If you can, wheth.
er It is the poisonous effIuvia Of
the gas company that asphyxiates
him, or an electric impulse that
deadens his nerve and paIsies his
marrow.


II he, perchance. proves true to
his constituents and to himself
